chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-3233 / 2011 ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- For hearing of main case 10-10-2016 Ch.Muhammad Ashraf, Advocate. Ch.Muhammad Latif Saghar, Advocate. --- Both the learned counsel submit that in view of the latest progress made for the renovation and other affairs of the Labour Court and Labour Appellate Tribunal, they do not want to proceed further. The petition is disposed of accordingly. Judge Judge ns
